positive: A central, highly detailed illustration of an enchanted celestial forest meeting a vibrant night sky. The composition features stylized bioluminescent flora (large glowing leaves, swirling cosmic vines, and trumpet-shaped flowers) interwoven with abstract nebula patterns and glowing constellations. Style should be modern baroque tattoo art mixed with Art Nouveau engraving, emphasizing strong black linework and elegant silhouettes. Use a limited, highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, muted violet, and stark white highlights, designed for maximum pop on fabric. The overall mood is mystical, wondrous, and symmetrical. Centered composition, flat graphic art style, vector illustration aesthetic, 8K, perfect print clarity.
